name: Heading
description: A heading element (h1-h6) with size and weight variants.

props.name: level
props.description: Semantic heading level (`'1'`–`'6'`). Determines the rendered `<h1>`–`<h6>` element and default size.

props.name: size
props.description: Explicit size override. When unset, derived from `level` (e.g. level `'1'` → `'4xl'`).

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic color tone. When unset, uses the recipe's default primary tone.

props.name: truncate
props.description: Truncate overflowing text with an ellipsis on a single line.
